text:

    lang/julia: Fix runtime issue

    * Disable automatic optimization as this causes runtime issues if CPU
    instructions are not available.
    * Install certificate

    PR:             265109
    Reported by:    Alexey Vyskubov <alexey@ocaml.nl>
